nasb.text: Then we cried to the Lord, the God of our fathers, and the Lord heard our voice and saw our affliction and our toil and our oppression;

esv.text: Then we cried to the Lord, the God of our fathers, and the Lord heard our voice and saw our affliction, our toil, and our oppression.

cnv.text: 於是我們向耶和華我們列祖的　神呼求，耶和華聽見了我們的聲音，看見了我們所受的困苦、勞碌和壓迫，

ccb.text: 于是，我们呼求我们祖先的上帝耶和华。祂听见我们的呼求，看见我们的艰难、困苦和所受的压迫，
